cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir. This is a call from Indane Gas. I am calling to inform you that the delivery person is on their way with your booked cylinder and will arrive in approximately one hour, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. Thank you for letting me know. What is the name of the delivery person, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, the delivery person's name is not available to me at this moment. But I can assure you that they will be there within the given time frame, Thik hai?
